name: Sorting by price surfaces the lowest-cost item first

steps.name: Given a Saucedemo user opens the login page
When the user signs in with standard credentials
And the user sorts the inventory by "Price (low to high)"
Then the first inventory item should display price "$7.99"
And the inventory should list "Sauce Labs Onesie" first

fullName: Saucedemo inventory management enhancements: Sorting by price surfaces the lowest-cost item first
